title: Foo Bar Realtime Streaming Metrics
description: Fix a broken realtime metrics pipeline: Redpanda streams metrics but ClickHouse materialized view is stale or failing. Restore sub-second aggregation from stream to OLAP.

tasks.description: Fix streaming consumer and ClickHouse materialized view for realtime metrics aggregation

infrastructure.description: Redpanda with metrics topic. ClickHouse with broken or empty realtime_metrics table. Consumer not running or misconfigured.
